title: SkyrimUI
description: Brings the Skyrim UI into Minecraft!
body:
# Skyrim Overlay

Brings the Skyrim UI into your Minecraft game! Everything is customisable so you can choose what overlays to replace! Fully integrated with vanilla status effects!

![Skyrim UI](https://i.imgur.com/J9qAWde.png)


## Future Plans

1. Skyrim Inventory
2. Skyrim UI for containers (i.e., furnances)


## Config

```
[gui_overlays]
	#Show Skyrim Compass Overlay
	showCompass = true
	#Show Skyrim Health Overlay
	showHealth = true
	#Show Skyrim Stamina Overlay
	showStamina = true
	#Show Skyrim Armor Icons Overlay
	showArmor = true
	#Show Skyrim Air Overlay
	showAir = true
	#Show Skyrim Crosshair Overlay
	showCrosshair = true
	#Show Skyrim Vehicle Health Overlay
	showVehicleHealth = true
	#Show Skyrim XP Bar Overlay
	showXPBar = true
	#Show Skyrim Boss Bar Overlay
	showBossOverlay = true
```
